# Sued by Credit Card Company? - What to Do [2026]
> Sued by a credit card company? Don't ignore it. Learn how to respond, raise defenses, and consider bankruptcy. 2026 step-by-step...

## About
suedbycreditcardcompany.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Sued by Credit Card Company? - What to Do: https://suedbycreditcardcompany.com/
- Privacy Policy: https://suedbycreditcardcompany.com/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
